scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/backend run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/extension run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/backend run lint && npm --prefix apps/extension run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/backend run test && npm --prefix apps/backend run test:smoke && npm --prefix apps/extension run test && npm --prefix apps/extension run test:smoke && bash scripts/validate-migrations.sh
